title: jatropha integerrima var. latifolia
intro: Jatropha integerrima var. latifolia, also known as the 'Prairie Fire' or 'Bleeding Heart' shrub, is a variety of the Jatropha integerrima plant, which is a flowering evergreen shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, wounds, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infections. The herbal preparations of Jatropha integerrima var. latifolia include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are prepared from the leaves, bark, or roots of the plant.
